[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows light gray and white lily-like flowers with dark leaves, filling most of the frame.

The main focus is a cluster of stylized lily flowers, with several petals opening outward and curving slightly, their centers dark with small dot-like details and short protruding shapes.

The setting appears indoors, with a pale, light-colored wall or panel forming the background; a bright window or light source is suggested on the right side, creating soft highlights and shadows on the petals.

The flowers are layered and overlapping, with long dark green to black leaves extending behind and around them. Lighting is diffuse and bright from the right, giving the petals a smooth, slightly glossy look and making the whites and light grays stand out against the dark foliage. The camera angle is close and straight-on, with the floral arrangement filling the majority of the image and edges cropped.

No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image shows a dense bouquet-like arrangement of lily flowers with dark leaves against a light indoor background. Soft right-side lighting highlights the pale petals and darker flower centers.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- **Text:** None detected

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to contain only an image (no visible UI text, captions, or letters).

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
